# Emulator test ignore list
# One ELF basename per line. Lines starting with # are comments.
# Tests listed here are skipped during CI. A warning is printed if an ignored
# test starts passing (indicating it can be removed from this list).

# --- CEC / single-step ---
cec-non-operating-env.s.elf    # non-operating environment mode not implemented
cec-syscfg-ssstep.S.elf        # SSSTEP per-instruction check not implemented
c_except_sys_sstep.S.elf       # single-step exception
se_excpt_ssstep.S.elf          # single-step exception
se_excpt_dagprotviol.S.elf     # DAG protection violation exception not implemented
se_ssstep_dagprotviol.S.elf    # single-step + DAG protection violation (timeout)

# --- Timer / MMR ---
c_interr_timer.S.elf
c_interr_timer_reload.S.elf
c_interr_timer_tcount.S.elf
c_interr_timer_tscale.S.elf
c_interr_disable.S.elf
c_interr_disable_enable.S.elf
c_interr_pending.S.elf
c_mmr_timer.S.elf
c_progctrl_clisti_interr.S.elf
c_progctrl_csync_mmr.S.elf

# --- Debug trace buffer ---
dbg_tr_basic.S.elf
dbg_tr_simplejp.S.elf
dbg_tr_tbuf0.S.elf
dbg_tr_umode.S.elf

# --- LMU / CPLB / memory protection ---
lmu_excpt_align.S.elf
lmu_excpt_default.S.elf
lmu_excpt_illaddr.S.elf
lmu_excpt_prot0.S.elf
lmu_excpt_prot1.S.elf
lmu_cplb_multiple0.S.elf       # timeout — CPLB not implemented
lmu_cplb_multiple1.S.elf       # timeout — CPLB not implemented

# --- MMR exception ---
mmr-exception.s.elf

# --- Opcode coverage tests (unimplemented instructions) ---
se_all16bitopcodes.S.elf
se_all32bitopcodes.S.elf
se_all64bitg0opcodes.S.elf
se_all64bitg1opcodes.S.elf
se_all64bitg2opcodes.S.elf

# --- Illegal combination (parallel slot rules) ---
se_illegalcombination.S.elf

# --- Undefined instruction ---
se_undefinedinstruction3.S.elf

# --- Benchmark (not a pass/fail test; run separately in benchmark job) ---
bench.s.elf
